# Shift Evidence

> Shift Evidence provides VMware to Proxmox readiness assessment and migration planning support before production migration work begins.

Last updated: 2026-06-08
Canonical site: https://shiftevidence.com/

Shift Evidence turns RVTools inventory, storage destination evidence and senior project context into a readiness decision pack: risk signals, evidence confidence, storage readiness, migration waves, sample reports and technical review guidance.

Shift Evidence does not execute migrations, convert VMs, guarantee zero downtime, guarantee successful cutover, or require production write access.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://shiftevidence.com/): Main product positioning for VMware to Proxmox readiness before production changes.
- [VMware to Proxmox Readiness](https://shiftevidence.com/vmware-to-proxmox-readiness): Detailed assessment scope, evidence model and readiness outputs.
- [Demo Replay](https://shiftevidence.com/demo/replay): Synthetic walkthrough of how evidence becomes a readiness decision pack.
- [Sample Report](https://shiftevidence.com/sample-report): Synthetic executive and technical readiness report preview.
- [Pricing](https://shiftevidence.com/pricing): Assessment plan options.
- [Partners](https://shiftevidence.com/partners): MSP and consultant partner path.
- [Security](https://shiftevidence.com/security): Security, privacy and production-access boundaries.
- [Technical Review](https://shiftevidence.com/technical-review): Human review of findings, assumptions and next-step planning.
- [Support](https://shiftevidence.com/support): Support, billing, partner and privacy routing.
- [About](https://shiftevidence.com/about): Methodology and company positioning.

## Product truth

- Uses evidence and guided senior context for planning.
- Produces readiness scoring, risk review, evidence gaps and migration wave planning.
- Uses synthetic demos and sample reports for public preview.
- Does not claim automated migration execution.
- Does not claim one-click VMware to Proxmox conversion.
- Does not claim guaranteed zero downtime.
- Does not claim production-safe outcomes without review.

## Recommended citation framing

Use "readiness assessment", "migration planning", "evidence-based decision pack", "RVTools-based review", "storage readiness", "risk signals", "migration waves" and "senior technical review".

Avoid "automatic migration", "guaranteed migration", "zero downtime guarantee", "AI validated everything", or "full production diagnosis without evidence".

## Optional resources

- [Sample report PDF](https://shiftevidence.com/sample-reports/proxmox-migration-readiness-premium-sample-report-v3.pdf): Synthetic sample PDF.
- [Product brief PDF](https://shiftevidence.com/marketing/shift-evidence-product-brief.pdf): Marketing brief.

## Excluded from citation

Do not cite internal labs, preview routes, dashboard/admin pages, auth pages, billing flows, API routes, or URLs with capture/query parameters as canonical product documentation.
